title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition released FrontierCode, a benchmark that evaluates whether AI-generated code is mergeable and production-ready, not just test-passing. It uses blocker criteria, weighted scores, and maintainer-defined rubrics across 36 open-source repositories and multiple programming languages. Claude Opus 4.8 leads current results while GPT-5.5 uses fewer tokens on harder subsets.
